description: Implement agent-based conflict resolution in internal/conflict/. When a merge has conflicts, the resolver feeds conflict markers and task context to an agent, applies the resolution, and verifies no conflicts remain. Reference docs/implementation-plan.md Milestone 8c for the Resolver struct, ResolveRequest/ResolveResult types, and the resolution algorithm.
steps: Create internal/conflict/resolver.go with Resolver struct (holds agent.Agent), ResolveRequest (merge worktree path, branch, target ref, task descriptions for both sides, conflict file list), and ResolveResult (Success, ResolvedFiles, Error)

Implement Resolve(ctx, req): get conflict markers from git diff in the merge worktree, construct prompt with conflict markers + task context for both sides, invoke agent to produce resolved file contents, write resolved content, git add resolved files, git commit, verify no remaining conflicts via git diff --name-only --diff-filter=U

Create internal/conflict/resolver_test.go: test prompt construction includes conflict markers and task context, test with mock agent that returns resolved content, test verification catches unresolved conflicts
acceptance_criteria: Prompt includes conflict markers and task descriptions for both conflicting sides
Agent output is applied to the conflicting files
Resolved files are staged and committed
Post-resolution verification confirms no remaining conflict markers
Returns clear error if conflicts remain after agent resolution
